name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.0 Planning polish and Tasklist stabilisation
label: Planning polish and Tasklist stabilisation
release_notes: Polishes the Planning/Finance/Nutrition page rhythm, improves focus-block hierarchy, removes duplicate Tasklist rendering from Google Sync, and filters elapsed unlinked calendar blocks from sync staging.
notes: Places the seasonal banner immediately below the top navigation and before the module heading on Planning, Finance and Nutrition for a more consistent page rhythm.
Keeps Planning, Finance and Nutrition as the main hosted work areas.
Makes signed-in/access chips and readiness messaging quieter so the page focus stays on the active module.
Removes the embedded printable Tasklist from Google Sync; printable tasklists now live only in the Tasklist tab, avoiding duplicate Streamlit widget keys.
Filters elapsed, unlinked one-off calendar blocks out of Google Sync staging so past time blocks do not inflate the ready-to-sync count.
Improves focus-based project display by nesting supporting time blocks visually inside their focus block and suppressing repeated Saved project steps headings.
Finance now renders one selected section at a time, which prevents hidden Projections controls from failing while the user is viewing another Finance section.
